# Prompts: P4 Auto-Fixer · P5 Tests · P6 Summary

---

## P4 Auto-Fixer Prompt

```
Read .github/plugins/p4-auto-fixer.md.

Run all auto-fixes on src-core/:

1. BinaryFormatter → System.Text.Json
   Search: new BinaryFormatter()
   Replace with: JsonSerializer.Serialize / Deserialize

2. Thread.Sleep → Task.Delay
   Search: Thread.Sleep(
   Replace with: await Task.Delay(, stoppingToken)

3. Nullable annotations
   Run: dotnet build --configuration Release
   For every CS8600/CS8603/CS8604 warning: add ? annotation
   Add ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull at top of affected public methods

4. String.Format → interpolation
   Search: String.Format("...{0}...", x)
   Replace with: $"...{x}..."

5. Task.Factory.StartNew → Task.Run
   Search: Task.Factory.StartNew
   Replace with: Task.Run(, cancellationToken)

6. Collection expressions
   Search: new List<T>()  new Dictionary
   Replace with collection expressions where unambiguous

7. Insert // TODO-MIGRATION: comment before any line that was changed
   structurally (not just syntax) during migration.

After all fixes:
  Run: dotnet build src-core/ --configuration Release
  Target: 0 errors. Warnings ≤ 5.
  Write results to .github/memory/auto-fix-report.json.
  Show fix counts per category.
```

---

## P5 Tests Prompt

```
Read .github/agents/agent-test-runner.md.

Run P5 validation:
1. dotnet build src-core/ --configuration Release → must be 0 errors
2. dotnet test src-core/ --filter "Category!=Integration&Category!=E2E"
   --collect:"XPlat Code Coverage" --logger "console;verbosity=minimal"
3. Show: tests passed, tests failed, coverage %
4. For each failure:
   - Show test name + error message
   - Classify: REGRESSION / NEW_FAILURE / FLAKY / ENVIRONMENT
   - State which agent to escalate to
5. dotnet list package --vulnerable → must be 0 HIGH/CRITICAL
6. Framework dependency gate:
   grep -r "using System.Web" src-core/ --include="*.cs"
   Must return 0 results

Block release if: any test failure, any HIGH/CRITICAL CVE,
any System.Web reference in src-core/.
```

---

## P6 Summary Report Prompt

```
Read .github/plugins/p6-migration-summary.md.

Compute summary from cached data only — do NOT re-read source files:
  - .github/memory/CODEBASE-MAP.md (counts per status)
  - .github/memory/migration-state.json (original inventory)
  - .github/memory/auto-fix-report.json (fix counts, if exists)

Calculate:
  screensMigrated  = count ✅ DONE .aspx entries in map
  apisMigrated     = count ✅ DONE controller entries
  filesBlocked     = count 🚧 BLOCK entries
  todoMarkers      = auto-fix-report.json todoMarkersInserted
  buildStatus      = last build result
  testsPassing     = last test run result
  tokensSaved      = (✅ count × 1480) — rough estimate

Write:
  .github/memory/migration-summary.json
  .github/memory/MIGRATION-SUMMARY.md

Show the markdown summary in chat.
Append to CODEBASE-MAP.md at bottom:
# MIGRATION COMPLETE: [date] · [screensMigrated] screens · [apisMigrated] APIs
```
